transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.emptyDescription: Your most recent incoming and outgoing payments will show up here.

alerts.channelReservesDesc: You won't be able to make payments until you fill your channel reserve.
alerts.openFirstChannelDesc: You won't be able to receive or send payments until you
alerts.onchainShownOnNode: On-chain transactions are shown on the Node page

onboarding.title: Get started with your Lokihub
onboarding.description: Follow these initial steps to set up and make the most of your Loki Hub.

openChannel.title: Open your first channel
openChannel.description: Establish a new Lightning channel to enable fast and low-fee Flokicoin transactions.

firstPayment.title: Send or receive your first payment
firstPayment.description: Use your newly opened channel to make a transaction on the Lightning Network.

connectApp.title: Connect your first app
connectApp.description: Seamlessly connect apps and integrate your wallet with other apps from your Hub.

backupKeys.title: Backup your keys
backupKeys.description: Secure your keys by creating a backup to ensure you don't lose access.

receive.title: Receive
receive.amountTooSmall: Amount too small for JIT payment. Minimum: {{amount}} {{unit}}.
receive.amountTooLarge: Amount too large for JIT payment. Maximum: {{amount}} {{unit}}.
receive.jitWhyNeededDesc: Lightning payments require inbound liquidity (receiving capacity). You currently don't have enough capacity to receive this amount directly.
receive.jitHowWorksDesc: Your LSP will automatically open a new channel Just-In-Time (JIT) when the payment arrives. This ensures your payment succeeds immediately without you needing to manually manage channels.
receive.feeLogic: The fee is the higher of the Minimum Fee or the calculated Proportional Fee.
receive.receiverPaysDesc: (Default) The fee is deducted from the amount you receive.
receive.senderPaysDesc: The fee is added to the invoice total. The sender pays the extra cost.
receive.descriptionPlaceholder: For e.g. who is sending this payment?

zeroAmount.title: Enter Amount
zeroAmount.description: This invoice has no amount. Enter how much you want to send.

onchain.title: Send On-chain
onchain.amountNotIdeal: Amount not ideal for On-chain transaction

withdraw.title: Withdraw On-chain Funds
withdraw.sendAllAlert: Entire wallet balance will be sent

about.title: About Sub-wallets
about.desc1: Sub-wallets are separate balances within your wallet. You can use them to budget your spending for specific apps, or to onboard friends and family to Flokicoin by giving them their own wallet.
about.desc2: Each sub-wallet has its own credentials and can be connected to apps independently.

intro.description: Create sub-wallets for yourself, friends, family or coworkers
intro.separateWalletsTitle: Sub-wallets are separate wallets hosted by your Lokihub
intro.separateWalletsDesc: Each sub-wallet has its own balance and can be used as a separate wallet that can be connected to Loki Account or any app.
intro.dependOnBalanceTitle: Sub-wallets depend on your Lokihub spending balance and receive limit
intro.dependOnBalanceDesc: Sub-wallets are using your Hubs node liquidity. They can receive funds as long as you have enough receive limit in your channels.
intro.waryOfSpendingTitle: Be wary of spending sub-wallets funds
intro.waryOfSpendingDesc: Make sure you always maintain enough funds in your spending balance to prevent sub-wallets becoming unspendable. Sub-wallet payments might fail if the amount isn't available in your spending balance.
intro.walletTypesTitle: Three ways to create a sub-wallet

increaseBalance.title: Increase Balance
increaseBalance.description: Increase the balance of this sub-wallet. Make sure you always maintain enough funds in your spending balance to prevent sub-wallets becoming unspendable.

decreaseBalance.title: Decrease Balance
decreaseBalance.description: Decrease the balance of this sub-wallet.

create.title: Create Sub-wallet
create.nameHelper: Name your friend, family member or coworker

typeChooser.title: New Sub-wallet
typeChooser.description: Choose the type of sub-wallet to create

simple.title: Simple Sub-wallet
simple.description: A standalone wallet with its own balance, funded from your Hub, with full send and receive permissions.

jit.title: JIT Wallet Hub
jit.description: Automatically issues a spend-only wallet whenever a recipient without a Lightning Wallet needs to get paid.

circle.title: Circle Wallet Hub
circle.description: Authorized members of your Nostr circle can request a Lightning Wallet from you, verified against your following list or allowlist.
